NVDA.reasoning: 1. MACRO REGIME: Transitional, leaning risk-on. S&P 500 up +9.3% in April (best month since 2020), powered by AI mega-cap earnings (Alphabet +7%, Amazon +4%). Fed held at 4.25%-4.50% with zero cuts now priced through 2026 and into 2027 (higher-for-longer). Active tail risks: US-Iran tensions driving oil elevated, Warsh succession uncertainty. The regime is fragile but not risk-off — AI tailwind is the near-term bull engine. 2. RELATIVE STRENGTH: NVDA is a clear sector leader. Daily ROC: +3.33% (5d), +5.22% (10d), +26.69% (21d) vs. broad market +9.3% for the full month — NVDA has nearly tripled the market's pace. Full EMA alignment uptrend confirmed daily and hourly. ADX 54.67 signals a very strong trend. Price holds above all major MAs (5/10/20/50/200 EMA and SMA). This is unambiguous outperformance — AI chip sector is the leading sector. 3. ASYMMETRIC R/R: Entry ~$209.25 (current price, consolidating from $216.83 high). Target: $231.13 (daily Fib 1.272 extension from the $164.27-$216.83 swing) = +10.4% upside. Stop: $205.30 (hourly Fib 0.618 retracement, below the volume-confirmed $208.20 support zone) = -1.9% downside. R/R ratio = 10.4% / 1.9% = ~5.5:1, well above the preferred 3:1 minimum. 4. CAPITAL PRESERVATION: NVDA thesis shows near-zero leverage, 61% revenue growth, 144% earnings growth, 59% operating margin — balance sheet is not a liability even if conditions tighten. Only flags: RSI-14 at 74.76 and RSI-21 at 81.52 are overbought readings; z-score vs 50-day is 1.92 (elevated); hourly OBV trend is down and hourly MACD histogram is negative, indicating short-term distribution pressure. This is consolidation, not reversal. Concern: at +26.69% in 21 days, NVDA may be maturing in the sector rotation cycle rather than early-stage, but the multi-year AI capex supercycle thesis extends this window well beyond typical 2-6 week rotation. Macro regime continuity confirmed vs. wiki state. Wiki thesis explicitly cautions against chasing — entry at the current pullback to hourly Fib 0.382 aligns with disciplined entry protocol.
